message:
Redesign PromptCard and PromptDetailModal with world-class polish

Major visual refresh inspired by Stripe's card design patterns:

PromptCard redesign:
- Add Stripe-style elevation on hover (-translate-y-1) with enhanced
  composite shadow for depth perception
- Featured prompts get a subtle top gradient accent bar (amber/orange)
- Difficulty badges now include background colors (emerald/amber/rose)
- Reduce visible tags from 4 to 3 for cleaner appearance
- Add Zap icon for token count display
- Redesign content preview with bordered container and fade overlay
- Compact action buttons: icons only on mobile, icons+labels on desktop
- Replace ExternalLink with ChevronRight for "View" button with hover
  animation (translate-x-0.5)
- Add comprehensive JSDoc explaining design principles

PromptDetailModal refinements:
- Add gradient background to Variables section with colored accent dot
- Improve input styling with explicit bg-white/dark:bg-zinc-900/50
- Replace list-disc with custom colored bullets (emerald for "When to
  Use", amber for "Tips")
- Add fade overlay to rendered prompt preview
- Style required field indicators with rose-500
- Improve action button hover states and copy success color
- Add border-t separator before action buttons

Both components use consistent sizing: text-[11px] for counts/meta,
text-xs for badges, and refined spacing throughout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
